headline: Stocktwits to Offer CME Group Futures Data to Its Community of 10 Million Investors & Traders
summary: Stocktwits, the leading social platform for investors and traders, today announced that its users can access interactive charts, streaming prices and dedicated cashtag pages for futures symbols spanning the full suite of CME Group regulated futures contracts across equities, FX, cryptocurrency, energy, agriculture, metals and interest rates markets.
